summary: Implemented ModuleValidator.validateManifest() with full structural and semantic validation: required fields, semver, capability type taxonomy (I7), default_enabled false (I1), params_schema shape, intrinsic restriction strings, hazard declaration types. Implemented ModuleLoader.load() pipeline: validate → hash verify (skip empty for dev mode, SHA-256 verify for non-empty) → DSL validation via compileDSL → success return. Added computeManifestHash() with deterministic canonical JSON. 32 new tests (20 validator + 12 loader). 127 module-loader tests total, all passing.
